title: Executive Assistant
description:
Core Administrative Support

Assisting the Facilities Manager

· Arranging daily work plans, meetings, and follow-up items

· Tracking facility-related needs and ensuring timely resolution

· Maintaining repair, maintenance, and inspection records

· Communicating and coordinating facility maintenance matters with suppliers and contractors

· Coordinating renovation and contractor management

· Categorizing and managing renovation project files

· Tracking contractor qualifications, contracts, and construction progress

· Ensuring compliance with safety and building codes

· Preparing project progress reports and budget summaries

Document and Archives Management

· Implementing a building archive system

· Establishing a structured electronic and paper archive system

· Categorizing and managing documents by facility, department, and project

· Ensuring secure storage and easy retrieval of drawings, permits, and maintenance records

· Internal Document Management

· Standardizing internal notification, report, and form templates

· Maintaining version control and approval processes

· Ensuring documents adhere to the latest SOPs and compliance requirements

Finance and Procurement Support

· Verify and process employee reimbursements and vendor payments

· Maintain approval records, invoices, and payment status

· Coordinate with the Finance Department to ensure timely payments

· Equipment drawings and classification management

· Organize technical drawings and specifications by equipment type

· Maintain equipment inventory and procurement records

· Assist with budgeting and planning for equipment upgrades

Cross-departmental Collaboration Support

· Support the Plant Investment Department

· Track the progress of capital expenditure projects and facility investments

· Prepare documentation required for audits and stakeholders

· Coordinate site visits and investment presentations

· Support the Public Relations Department

· Manage the logistics of public relations events held within the facility

· Ensure venue preparation and branding meet requirements

· Responsible for guest reception and internal communication coordination

· Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) Development and Implementation

· Collaborate with various departments to develop and optimize SOP processes

· Implement SOP training and compliance tracking

· Regularly review and update process documentation based on feedback

Travel and Reception Management

· Book flights, accommodation, and transportation for employees and guests

· Prepare itineraries and related documents

· Follow up travel budgets and approval processes

· Overall reception and processing management

· Oversee front desk operations and visitor management

· Maintain records of incoming and outgoing courier services and documents

· Ensure the professional and secure handling of sensitive information

Ad hoc administrative tasks as required to support the Group office

postedCompany.description:
Metech International Limited is a public limited liability company incorporated and domiciled in Singapore with its registered office and principal place of business at 100G Pasir Panjang Road, #04-07 Interlocal Centre, Singapore 118523. The Company is listed on the Catalist of the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited (“SGX-ST”). 


The principal activity of the Company is that of investment holding.
postedCompany.name: METECH INTERNATIONAL LIMITED
